programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1
programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.
programme.sub-title: WPT Seminole Hardrock Poker Showdown - Part 1

programme.desc: A field of 1,360 players is down to six with Maria Ho battling against WPT Champions James Carroll and Eric Afriat for her first WPT title and $715,000 in HyperX Esports Arena in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Berlin - PT3
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LA Poker Classic - PT1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tvunget perspektiv
programme.desc: Dylan blir arrestert for å ha myrdet en diktator for 300 år siden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Summen av delene
programme.desc: Andromeda styres av en drone fra Consensus of Parts, et mytisk mekanisk samfunn. Mens den først var vennlig, prøver dronen å tvinge skipet til å bli med i konsensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjernekryss
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir forelsket i det som viser seg å være avataren til et krigsskip ved navn Gabriel. Gabriel prøver å smitte Rommie med et virus som sender planene sine til krigsskipet

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Beka tar Andromeda til Tarn-Vedra, men lengre tid i slipstream forårsaker bivirkninger. For å bekjempe dem, begynner Beka å ta Flash og blir snart avhengig.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dens time kommer 'Runde endelig
programme.desc: Et gammelt minne fra Andromeda aktiveres ved et uhell, noe som sender henne på oppdrag og etterlater Dylan ved siden av mannskapet ikke i stand til å overstyre kommandoen.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Widinging Gyre
programme.desc: Dylan og Rommie må redde Tyr, Harper og Rev fra et Magog-verdensskip.

programme.title: Andromeda: Utgangsstrategier
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev og Tyr krasjer land etter å ha rømt en gjeng Nietzscheans, men møter snart en ny trussel: Revs behov for å mate..

programme.title: Andromeda: Et hjerte for falskhet innrammet
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stjele en juvel som er i sentrum av en strid mellom en driftseier og Than. Beka faller for en sikkerhetssjef som tidligere var en tyv.

programme.title: Andromeda: Pitiless as the Sun
programme.desc: Andromeda svarer på et nødanrop når et lasteskip blir angrepet

programme.title: Andromeda: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren
programme.desc: Mannskapet ser etter en mistet Commonwealth-leder som har skjult seg.
programme.sub-title: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren

programme.title: Andromeda: Altfor menneskelig
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka og Trance går sammen med Rommie for å finne ut om et våpen som utvikles på en planet som mistro AI.

programme.title: Andromeda: Una Salus Victus
programme.desc: Andromeda har til oppgave å eskortere medisinske skip trygt gjennom Drago-Kazov-rommet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjemmebranner
programme.desc: En planet av Commonwealth-overlevende ledet av Dylans tidligere forlovede blir invitert til å bli med i det nye Commonwealth, men når de stemmer for ikke å bli med, blir Magog mistenkt for å ha spilt skittent.

programme.title: Andromeda: Inn i labyrinten
programme.desc: En avgrunnsagent prøver å lokke Harper til å bli med i Magog

programme.title: Andromeda: Prinsen
programme.desc: Når de redder en ung prins fra et opprør som dreper resten av familien hans, blir Dylan og Tyr bedt om å være hans rådgivere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Magog-eggene i Harper begynner å klekkes, så teamet bygger en Tesseract-maskin

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching The Surface
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Magic, the Gathering, Lightning Family, Dennis Keith Smith, Thelma and Louise, Dede's Gone and Sweetheart Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mia Zapata, Billy the Kid, Wanted Nanny, Dreams Come True and Calculating Coroners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Emery's Last Stand, Hansen Twin Murder (Pts. 1 & 2), Pix Of The Dead, Fatal Obsession and Baseball Amnesia.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: After Dinner Death, George Anderson (Pts. 1 & 2), Rudolph on the Run, Campus Murder Expose and Palm Beach Embezzler.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mystery Robber, Magnetic Attraction (Pts. 1 & 2), Johnny Lee Wilson, Call for Help and Borden House.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Texas Wife Murder, Falcon Lake UFO, Trucker Death, Lost Dutchman's Mine and Rider Down.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Casolaro, Update: Thelma and Louise, Mothman, Elysian Park Treasure, Fatal Flowers and Missing Rainman.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 18
programme.desc: This episode includes: Two May Murders, The Dale, Carolina Cop Killer, Haunted Mansion, Update: Red Lake Heir and Florida Fires.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 19
programme.desc: This episode includes: Love Triangle, Ghostly Attraction, Update: Shigemoto's Bodyguard, Amtrak Sabotage, Artist for the Prosecution and Fake Doctor Fraud.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 20
programme.desc: This episode includes: Millionairess Murder, Medjugorje, Huey's Quest (rts. 1 & 2) and Where Is She Now?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 21
programme.desc: This episode includes: A Couple of Good Men, Ladies Man, McDonald's Murder, Lucky Choir and Vanished in the Heartland.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 22
programme.desc: This episode includes: Murder Premonition, Lady and the Tramp, Getaway Photo, Coma Recovery, Newsman's Lost Love and Update: Cop Assault.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode includes: Stamper's Rampage, Desperately Seeking Susan, Mucho Oro, Airline Employee Murder, Update: DJ Death and Hospital Hoax.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rainboy, Louisiana Burning, Update: Car Crash Thank You, Donut Murder and Social Security Murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Baron 52 Crew, Scared to Death, Update: Thumbs, Fertility Statues, Rest Stop Killer and Thank You Philip.

programme.desc: En 24/7 kanal for folk som er nyskjerrige på mote og design! Supermodellen Heidi Klum er vert for denne spennende reality-serien som gir sultne, talentfulle designere sjansen til å vise frem sitt arbeid for New York.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Driven to Kill
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Remorse
programme.desc: A small town without any crime was turned inside out by the arrival of one dangerous stranger. Some killers are cold and calculating; others are impulsive, unpredictable, and hard to pin down.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Perfect Heist
programme.desc: Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shattered Vows
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out Of The Grave
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Dosage
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder For Hire
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate claims of a ghost lady in grey haunting Windleshaw abbey, St Helens, Merseyside. Over 600 years old and with new paranormal encounters reported almost weekly. Bex and Sean attempt to make contact with the infamous lady in grey.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.
programme.sub-title: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to Derbyshire to investigate the New Mills Arts Theatre. This quirky little building has played host to many famous acts and world-renowned plays but has a little-known secret in that it's allegedly haunted.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team is ready for act II at the New Mills Arts Theatre. With so much apparent activity happening at this unassuming theatre, the team just couldn't leave when so much more could happen.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of New Mills Art Theatre Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Haunted Weir Mill
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team visits Weir Mill, the oldest and most paranormally active mill in Stockport.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Old Glen and Milner Curse
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team heads to Shipley, West Yorkshire to investigate The Old Glen House Pub.
programme.sub-title: The Old Glen and Milner Curse

programme.title: Past Hunters: Bulkeley Hotel
programme.desc: The former home of Queen Victoria is now home to many spirits who have been seen by guests and staff. Witness the first ever formal documentation of the paranormal activities in the Bulkeley Hotel.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?
programme.sub-title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Better Not Fail That Test!
programme.desc: Lainie and Justin have a 9-month-old baby together. Justin hurts Lainie because he thinks she’s cheating. But how will Steve react when he confronts Justin?
programme.sub-title: You Better Not Fail That Test!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Cover for Him?
programme.desc: Gina believes that her daughter’s boyfriend Efrain is abusing her grandson. Her daughter wants to prove that Efrain is innocent, but her father Raul suspects she is covering for Efrain.
programme.sub-title: How Could You Cover for Him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
programme.desc: Kendra is on a mission to save herself from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
programme.sub-title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Over the Edge
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?
programme.sub-title: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?
programme.sub-title: Look What You Did to Your Baby

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?
programme.sub-title: I Did It To Hurt You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.
programme.sub-title: I Left You, But You Are The Father

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Were You Ever Even Pregnant?
programme.desc: Kaliegh is 23 but has been a heroin addict for five years. Her mom, best friend, and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?
programme.sub-title: These DNA Results Will Floor You

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!
programme.sub-title: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Loose Cannon
programme.desc: In the dead of night, a shooter on a rampage rips through a home, leaving a grandmother disfigured, her 24 year old daughter dead, and a two year-old child clinging to life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: 12 Years a Fugitive
programme.desc: When a beloved grandmother is found stabbed to death in her own home, Kenda must turn to a tight-knit community still grieving from the tragic loss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencers sjarm fører Heidi hjem til Colorado, der gjenopptar hun kontakten med en gammel flamme. Lauren forteller Stephanie hva hun syns om at Heidi kom i bursdagsselskapet. Spencer snakker med Brody igjen etter en lang tids taushet.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Etter at Heidi tar Spencer på fersken på en nattklubb med bartenderen Stacie, krever hun at de skal gå i parterapi. Lauren setter ryktet sitt på spill når hun skaffer Stephanie en praktikantplass hos People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: The Hills: It's On Bitch
programme.desc: Kristin starter krig når hun forsøker seg på Justin foran Audrina. Spencer og Heidi leter etter hus, og Spencer kjøper et hus uten Heidis godkjennelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Mess With Me, I Mess With You
programme.desc: Etter at Audrina ikke dukket opp, bestemmer Kristin seg for ikke å kjempe mot sine følelser for Justin. Heidi melder seg som barnevakt for naboen, men Spencer vil ikke ha noe med unger å gjøre.
programme.sub-title: Mess With Me, I Mess With You

programme.title: The Hills: Strike One
programme.desc: Kristin får smake på hvordan det er å ha et forhold til Justin når han ikke dukker opp på Brodys overraskelsesfest. Heidi og Spencer er uenige om når de skal starte familie, og Audrina dater Justins bestevenn.

programme.title: The Hills: Old Habits Die Hard
programme.desc: Kristin tror hun har temmet Justin, men kanskje er han fortsatt ikke over Audrina. Når Holly mister kontrollen på en tilstelning, er det Heidis jobb å få søsteren til å innrømme alkoholproblemet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: Sorry Boo, Strike Two
programme.desc: Justin gjør seg kostbar med Kristin, men biter seg i halen. Hollys drikking fører til at Heidi og Stephanie må gripe inn. Brody og Jayde krangler slik at de må revurdere forholdet sitt.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Justin går på glør etter at Kristin og Audrina endelig møtes ansikt til ansikt. Alt Heidi ønsker seg til bursdag er en baby, men Spencer har helt andre planer.

programme.title: The Hills: On To The Next
programme.desc: Kristin og Brody vurderer å date igjen, men når de støter på Jayde forstår de at tiden ikke er moden. Audrina og Justin møtes for å diskutere framtiden, men det ender ikke som hun håpet. Spencer går drastisk til verks mot Heidis babybesettelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Can't Always Get What You Want
programme.desc: Kristin støter sammen med Jayde når hun kommer for å gjenerobre Brody. Heidi legger en plan for å bli gravid med eller uten Spencers samtykke, og Audrina må takle at Justin fortsatt har følelser for Kristin.
programme.sub-title: Can't Always Get What You Want

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. Right Now
programme.desc: Kristin vil ikke ha Justin, men han gir henne ikke opp så lett. Audrina avslutter forholdet til Justin for godt. Brody får kalde føtter når Jayde vil flytte inn hos ham, og Spencer frykter at Heidi muligens kan være gravid.

programme.title: The Hills: The Boys Of Summer
programme.desc: Kristin og Justin vil gå videre med forholdet, og Spencer konfronterer Heidi med graviditetstesten. Brody har kanskje fortsatt følelser for Kristin etter at Jayde konfronterer ham med tilstanden til deres forhold på en forlovelsesfest.

programme.title: The Hills: Put On A Happy Face
programme.desc: Heidis hjemkomst blir ødelagt når moren hennes misliker hennes plastisk kirurgi. Kristin og jentene drar til Miami for Super Bowl-helgen, men det blir dårlig stemning når den harde festingen hennes begynner å bekymre Audrina, Lo og Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Når ryktene begynner å spres om Kristins festing, får Stephanie skylden. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr, men det stopper ikke Brody fra å prøve seg på henne. Spencer blir opprørt når han møter på Stephanie på Kristins fest.

programme.title: The Hills: The Elephant In The Room
programme.desc: Heidi arrangerer en fest for naboen hennes, men det blir overskygget av at Spencer blir sint på Holly. Kristin oppfordrer Audrina til å forplikte seg til Ryan, og prøver deretter å komme nærmere Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: This Is Goodbye
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencers oppførsel fører til at deres venner og familie tar et vanskelig valg. Kristin og Brody roter, men er enige om å fortsette som single. Ryan skuffer Audrina når han ikke dukker opp for en kveld på byen.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Bird
programme.desc: Brody risikerer sitt vennskap med Kristin når han begynner å date ei annen jente. Lo setter Stephanie opp på en dobbeldate. Ryan gir Audrinas venner en ny sjanse.

programme.title: The Hills: Ghost From The Past
programme.desc: Kristin sliter med å gå videre etter Brody. Audrina møter på Justin og begynner å tvile på sitt forhold til Ryan. Lo blir venn med Brodys nye kjæreste.

programme.title: The Hills: The Company You Keep
programme.desc: Brodys nye flamme gjør en fiende av Kristin når hun tar med seg en gammel rival av Kristins på en fest. Ryan kommer tilbake fra turneen, men Audrina forteller ham ikke at hun møtte Justin mens han var borte.

programme.title: The Hills: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place
programme.desc: Audrinas forhold til Ryan blir satt på prøve når han møter Justin for første gang. Brody er på Kristins side når Allie krangler med henne. Stephanie har en skuffende andre date.
programme.sub-title: Between A Rocker And A Hard Place

programme.title: The Hills: Break-Up to Make-Up
programme.desc: Akkurat da Audrina avslutter ting med Ryan, overrasker Justin henne på bursdagen hennes. McKaelas venn Allie lager mer trøbbel med Kristin. Brody forteller Justin hva han tenker.

programme.title: The Hills: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: På en surfetur til Costa Rica, gjør Kristin Brody sjalu ved å rote med en lokal bartender, Audrina prøver å bekjempe hennes tiltrekning til Justin, og Stephanie finner seg selv på kant med jungelmiljøet.

programme.title: The Hills: Loves Me Not
programme.desc: Kristin har en åpenthjertig samtale med Brody, hun ønsker å gi forholdet en ny sjanse. Heidis mor kommer til LA, i håp om å forsone seg med henne. Lo og kjæresten hennes feirer sitt jubileum, og Stephanie begynner å date en ny.

programme.title: The Hills: All Good Things...
programme.desc: Kristin står overfor en stor avgjørelse som også påvirker Brody. Audrina slår opp med Justin. Lo vet ikke om hun er klar til å ta neste skritt med hennes kjæreste og Stephanie mener hun har endelig funnet sann lykke.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Hold Grudges... JK!
programme.desc: Det er en ny begynnelse for den ikoniske vennegruppen da de kommer tilbake til The Hills og tar opp kontakten etter mange år. Nye utfordringer, gamle feider og romanser kolliderer. Fortiden er nemlig ikke alltid i fortiden.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.
programme.sub-title: A Legend in His Own Mind

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.
programme.sub-title: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.
programme.sub-title: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Welcome to the Peak
programme.desc: Ti realitekjendiser ankommer vinterlandskapet for å se om de kan finne sin neste for minglesesongen. Hva de ikke vet er at eksene deres kommer til å styrte inn som et snøskred.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Winter Un-Wonderland
programme.desc: Eksene til Callum og Nicole forårsaker skikkelig trøbbel i huset. En kjærlighetsforbindelse oppstår for et par og brytes raskt for et annet. En ny eks ankommer og den første 'Hot Date' blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Caught Red Velvet Handed
programme.desc: Daniel gjør et klossete forsøk på en kjærlighetsforbindelse. Varmen stiger i "Sauna of Secrets" for en utro singel. Den første eksen ises ut av sommrhuset.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: De Niall Is Not Just an Ex
programme.desc: Marlon får mange eksers oppmerksomhet og Adore er mindre glad for det. En sjarmerende overraskelse avbryter "the Hot Date".
programme.sub-title: De Niall Is Not Just an Ex

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Boo Years Eve!
programme.desc: "Sauna of Secrets" avslører et mysterie for Marlons eks. To singler slåss om den samme eksen. Tingene går varme under Ice Ceremony når en eks foretar et overraskende trekk.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: The Bird Has Landed
programme.desc: Georgia og Callums forhold settes på prøve når den eksen de frykter mest dukker opp. Spenningen gnistrer over La Demis siste kjærlighet. En romantisk Hot Date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: SOS, Save Our Singles
programme.desc: En sjokkerende "Sauna of Secrets" betyr at singlene må passe seg under "Ice Ceremony". Allie og Nialls av og på-forhold gjør at Allie havner på gyngende grunn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Ex-Cuzzi
programme.desc: En perfekt date blir til et perfekt mareritt for et par. Niall får seriøs konkurranse om Allies hengivenhet. Marlon og La Demi kjemper for å finne ut av situasjon-forholdet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Mums the Word
programme.desc: Georgia og Callum møter sine verste kritikere. Marlon fanges mellom en stein og en varmt sted da en eks som eventyrer forholdet hansmed La Demi ankommer. Ice Ceremony tar en uventet vri.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Don't Say Soulmate
programme.desc: Når en første kjørlighet ankommer the Peak, kastes de gyldne parene inn i en loop. En ny forbindelse og et overraskende valg under "Hot Date" får Tyranny til å se rødt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Adore-able Mess
programme.desc: Adores besøk på "Sauna of Secrets" setter romansen med Tyler på spill. En ny eks innebærer en velkommen distraksjon. La Demis innstilling til eksen sin, får bestevennen hennes til å vende seg mot henne under Ice Ceremony.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Breaking Winter Balls
programme.desc: Adore presses til å velge mellom eksen og sin neste, og presser en av dem i et sjalusiutbrudd. En heit date blir belønnet, noe som får spenningen til å gnistre og gir noen hjertesorg.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Liar, Liar, Chalet on Fire
programme.desc: En sjokkerende løgndetektortest gjør hele huset rasende, og et sterkt par mister troen på forholdet sitt. Endelig får Georgia vite sannheten om Callum og Paris.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Peak of Love: Say Yes to the Next
programme.desc: Sannhetsseremonien har etterlatt sommerhuset i kaos, og parene skal endelig bestemme om de vil dra med eksen, den neste eller alene. En singel stiller spørsmålet mens andre drar opprørte når sannheten er for mye å ta inn.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Love, Next Love
programme.desc: Ti realitystjerner ankommer paradiset for å finne sin neste kjærlighet. Samtidig vet de at eksene deres kommer til å ødelegge festen. Kommer eksene i veien for deres nyutkårne eller blir de deres neste?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Serving Revenge
programme.desc: Shack of Secrets overrasker og gir Mark og Elena innsikt om deres forholds tidslinje. En ny eks får ikke bestemt seg om de er her for kjærlighet eller hevn. En eks blir sendt hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: I Put a Crush on You
programme.desc: Et telefonspill fører til et oppgjør mellom Aubrey og Devin. En morsom malefest utvikler seg til det verre. Første 'Crush Date' får en pris.
programme.sub-title: I Put a Crush on You

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Cam You Feel the Love Tonight
programme.desc: Cameron blir fanget mellom eksen og den neste. Et par sliter med å bli enige om de er et par, eller ikke. En eks blir sendt hjem.
programme.sub-title: Cam You Feel the Love Tonight

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: This is Episode 5 But Let's Call It 6
programme.desc: Devin møter Maries sinne da han kaller henne 'a six'. Billy prøver seg på Lexi. En ny eks blir en spennende nestemann for en singel. En Crush Date blir belønnet.
programme.sub-title: This is Episode 5 But Let's Call It 6

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Mother of All Secrets
programme.desc: En ny eks og et besøk av mamma forrykker et spirende forhold. Marie kjemper med å være 'a six.' Singlene samler seg for å sende hjem et eks som hindrer en venn fra å finne sin neste.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Exes Haunt These Fields
programme.desc: En eks ankommer på den verste tiden for å fullstendig velte en nytent romanse mellom en singel og dennes eks. Mark setter krydder på tingene med Aubrey. Billy er helt på knærne etter Lexi. En Crush date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Coffey Run
programme.desc: CAmeron stilles for retten for forbrytelser mot eksene sine. Mark og Aubrey må stride mot en uventet eks. En eks blir sendt hjem.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and the boys at West Coast Customs transform a '91 Ford Escort into a European luxury mobile.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs give a 1958 VW some California love, and turn it into the ultimate beach ride.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit takes a busted off-road '85 Suburban and gives it an electronic makeover not to be believed.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit puts the fire back into a wrecked '87 Chevy Blazer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, Xzibit and West Coast Customs help a 1988 Acura Legend live up to its name.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: When Xzibit rolls on into the garage with the Fairlane, the boys can't believe their eyes. So they decide to give West his Fairlane back to tinker with and get him a brand-new pimped Toyota 4Runner.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast pimp Nate's Ford Econoline.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Sara's Chevrolet S-10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Brooke's Chevrolet Cavalier Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tom's Chevrolet Caprice.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Eric's Mitsubishi Eclipse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit and the boys at West Coast get an unforgettable surprise when they discover a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Josh's Toyota Corolla.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Heather's Chevrolet C10.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Tin's Dodge Caravan.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Alex's Chevrolet Chevelle Convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, West Coast Customs pimps Cristi's Chevrolet Panel Truck.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Calvin's Chevrolet Malibu.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Erin's Volkswagen Thing.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Monique's Mitsubishi Galant.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: iCarly: Rommet brenner
programme.desc: Spencer prøver å overraske Carly på bursdagen hennes, men ender opp med å brenne ned rommet hennes. Men når forsikringsselskapet gir ham en stor sjekk, har han sjansen til å gjøre det godt igjen.

programme.title: iCarly: Ja
programme.desc: Etter at en iCarly fan frir til kjæresten på nettshowet, blir gjengen nesten tvunget til å gå i bryllupet. Men når bruden får kalde føtter, må Carly komme til unnsetning.

programme.title: iCarly: T-skjortesalg
programme.desc: Gjengen begynner å selge Penny-skjorter, og når salget går susende, rekrutterer Sam barn fra 4. klasse for å bidra til å lage t-skjorter. Men Carly, Sam og Freddie er uenige om hvordan de skal behandles.

programme.title: iCarly: Rampestreker
programme.desc: Når hun blir ertet for aldri å ha funnet på en morsom spøk, rekrutterer Carly Spencer for å spøke med Sam og Freddie. Men etter at Spencer har fått sansen for det, kan han ikke slutte. Mob må finne en måte å stoppe ham på.

programme.title: iCarly: Moren til Sam
programme.desc: Etter å ha kranglet ned moren sin, flytter Sam inn til Carly, som snart innser at hun er en fryktelig gjest. Freddie blir forfulgt av en farlig kriminell etter å ha fanget ham på film da han begikk en forbrytelse.

programme.title: iCarly: Nevel trenger hjelp
programme.desc: Når en video av Nevel, som skriker til en liten jente, dukker opp på internett, blir Nevel hatet av alle. Men Nevel trygler iCarly-gjengen om hjelp for å redde sin ære.

programme.title: iCarly: Den kjekke assistenten
programme.desc: Carly og Sam ansetter en kjekk fyr som praktikant på nettshowet.

programme.title: iCarly: iOMG
programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer kvelden med å fullføre sine prosjekter ved Ridgeway under den årlige skole-innlåsingen. Carly og Freddie mistenker at Sam er forelsket i sin nye venn Brad.

programme.title: iCarly: iParty med Victorious
programme.desc: Carly mistenker at den nye typen hennes, Steven, er utro med Tori Vega, så gjengen planlegger en tur til Los Angeles for å ta ham på fersken på en fest som Andre holder i Kenan Thompsons hus.

programme.title: iCarly: Datehjelpen
programme.desc: Carly trår til for å løse en krangel mellom Sam og Freddie. Snart kommer Freddie og Sam til Carly for å få hjelp med hver eneste krangel. Nå som hun har involvert seg, hvordan kan Carly trekke seg ut av det igjen?

programme.title: iCarly: Det holder
programme.desc: Mrs Benson oppdager Sam og Freddies forhold etter at Gibby - som nå er mål for Sams hevn - har lagt planer om å splitte dem. Kommer Carly til å slåss for Sam og Freddie, eller hjelpe Gibby med å få dem til å gå fra hverandre?

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg elsker deg
programme.desc: Carly ber Sam og Freddie om å prøve hverandres yndlingshobbier. I mens treffer Spencer på sin gamle barnevakt og ber henne ut på middag. Etter at de har falt inn i sine gamle roller igjen, kommer de fortsatt til å kunne være sammen?

programme.title: iCarly: iQ
programme.desc: Carly vil imponere en ny fyr ved å prøve å virke smartere enn hun er. Og gjengen prøver å finne et nytt sted å bo til T-Bo, etter at han har blitt kastet ut av Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly: Møtet med førstedamen
programme.desc: Et føderalt bureau begynner å undersøke iCarly-gjengen etter at de hacker seg inn på et sikkerhetsnettverk for å holde nettfødselsdag for Carlys far. Gjestestjerne - Michelle Obama.

programme.title: iCarly: Billetten
programme.desc: Gjengen, minus Carly, tar med Sam til Canadian Fat Cake-fabrikken, men oppdager så at Sam ikke får komme tilbake inn i USA. I mens får Carly bekymringer i badekaret når hun gjør seg klar til daten sin.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Yakima
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt disset i et intervju om iCarly, prøver Freddie å vise sin kreative side gjennom å webb-sende iCarly i 3D. Spencer ansetter en assistent som han ikke har råd til å betale.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, skuespilleren som spiller Rex on Victorious, venner tilbake som vert i et dyptgående intervju med stjernerne fra iCarly og viser deres supergøyale tabber og bortklipte scener. Gjestestjerne: Rex fra Victorious

programme.title: iCarly: Fortsatt like gal
programme.desc: Ettr å ha fått beskjed om at Nora Dershlit blir løslatt fra fengselet, ser iCarly-gjengen på hva de kan gjøre for å holde sin gamle kidnapper bak lås og slå. Imens oppdager Freddies mor den virkelige T-Bo.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly møter One Direction
programme.desc: Carly får en smittsom sykdom og kommer til å smitte et medlem i bandet One Direction. I mens skal Spencer trene en liten jente som ikke kan fordra å morsjonere.

programme.title: iCarly: Restauranten
programme.desc: Gibby åpner en hemmelig restaurant i skolens kjeller med Sams hjelp. Og Spencer designer en sikkerhetsrobot til hjemmebruk, som plutselig mister fokus helt.

programme.title: iCarly: Aprilsnarr
programme.desc: I dette spesielle aprilsnarr-avsnittet blir Carly og Spencer satt på gaten, så gjengen sitter og tenker tilbake på sin tid i Bushwell Plaza. Men minnene deres stemmer kanskje ikke alltid helt med hvordan vi husker hendelsene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dårlig stemning i butikken
programme.desc: Freddies nye drømmejobb i Pear Store blir et mareritt når Sam også blir ansatt. Imens prøver Carly å bli inviteret ut av en fra Pear Store, og Spencer må melde seg til frivillig jobb på den lokale brannstasjonen.

programme.title: iCarly: Halloween
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen holder en "Halfoween"-fest, for de syns at det skal være Halloween to ganger i året. Men da en forkledd gjest spiller Carly og vennene et puss, blir festen litt for vill.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
programme.desc: Cowabunga! Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles kommer rett fra kloakken og er klare til å kjempe mot både fremmede og mutante fiender. Ta en pizza og gjør deg klar for maksimal Turtle Power!
