programme.title: Andromeda: Lava og raketter
programme.desc: Dylan overtar en turistpram i et forsøk på å unnslippe leiesoldater.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vær alle mine synder husket
programme.desc: En kroppsidentifikasjon går galt når det viser seg at Bekas tidligere mannskap ikke er død.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Grift
programme.desc: Brennans skyggefulle ekskjæreste henvender seg til ham for å få hjelp når hennes siste svindel tar en dødelig vending.

programme.title: Mutant X: At Destiny's End
programme.desc: Teamet står overfor sitt farligste oppdrag ennå: å stoppe en gruppe øko-terrorister.

programme.title: Mutant X: Within These Walls
programme.desc: Brennan er opprørt over Adam, som forteller ham at han ble betrodd å holde hemmeligheten og drar etter å ha snakket med den personen. Mannen leter etter noen og er villig til å drepe alle for å komme til den personen.

programme.title: Mutant X: Hard Time
programme.desc: Teamet går undercover for å undersøke uforklarlige dødsfall i fengselet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Reel Thing
programme.desc: Arbeidet som konsulenter for en arkeologisk eventyrfilm, innser Sydney og Nigel at farao Amun IIs 'rekvisitter' er ekte, lenge tenkte tapte relikvier. Hvordan kan de være?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Out of the Past
programme.desc: Claudia oppdager at hun var Cleopatras tjener i et tidligere liv da hun opplever déjà vu mens hun så på en katalog fra en antikkegyptisk relikvieutstilling.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Eyes of Toklamanee
programme.desc: Sydney og studenten Adam er på forfedrenes fantastiske Eyes of Toklamanee, men de forfølges av mystiske våpenmenn.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Run Sydney Run
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er i bakhold i Russland. To uker senere våkner Sydney i huset til en mann som heter Tsarlov, som hevder å ha reddet henne.

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans
programme.desc: Andromeda redder døende mennesker fra en drift, men de blir snart til zombier som blir kontrollert av en bikube.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ting vi ikke kan endre
programme.desc: Et svart hull slår Dylan ut og sender ham inn i en alternativ virkelighet med kone og barn.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Mutant X: Under the Cloak of War
programme.desc: Shalimar blir sendt undercover i en dødelig høyteknologisk attentatring, for å finne hvorfor de vil ha Adam død.

programme.title: Mutant X: Once Around
programme.desc: Teamet går inn for å beskytte det viktigste påtalevitnet hvis liv har blitt truet før rettssaken.

programme.title: Mutant X: Final Judgement
programme.desc: En mystisk domstol finner Adam skyldig i å ha prøvd å dominere verden med sine supermutanter og dømmer ham til døden, og har sendt resten av teamet på oppdrag for å redde ham.

programme.title: Mutant X: Inferno
programme.desc: Teamet er på sporet av en pyromanmutant som forårsaker kaos, mens Shalimar blir tvunget til å sette av sin frykt for ild for å redde Emma.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: M.I.A.
programme.desc: Sydney blir kidnappet, men av hvem? Nigel, Claudia og Cate blir nødt til å gå gjennom listen over fiender Sydney har laget tidligere og utlede hvem av dem som er ansvarlige. Cue tilbakeblikk.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Don't Go Into the Woods
programme.desc: Sydneys venn ringer for å informere henne om at han har oppdaget informasjon om Golden Hawk of Maribor, tapt siden 1711. Sydney og Nigel reiser til Lubjanka for å møte ham, men han er allerede borte.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A day at Knott's Berry Farm is the prize for the team whose tasting-menu for a 'Hell's Kitchen' prom wins over the judges.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay challenges the contestants' creativity by asking them to make an innovative and delicious entrée salad.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must name the ingredients that are labelled on a spinning roulette wheel. Chef Ramsay then asks them to prepare dishes using the ingredients that they named.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must shop on a budget and prepare elegant dishes for four judges. The winners go sailing and dancing while the losers fumigate Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams participate in a blind taste test and Gordon Ramsay challenges the teams to compete in a relay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams participate in a blind taste test. Ramsay challenges the teams to compete in a relay.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Five notable chefs will judge the contestants on their five portions of an amuse-bouche to be created in just 20 minutes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Paris Hilton is in attendance at the dinner service, but will she prove more of a distraction or just be distracted?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Using only their eyesight, their noses and their taste buds, the four remaining chefs must re-create a dish without a recipe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs must create fusion dishes by mixing cuisines from two different countries, the winner has a dinner date with Chef Ramsay and their family while the losers participate in moving day.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two finalists are taken to LA Market where the winner will work, and told to cook five dishes for a taste test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A new batch of contestants battle for a head chef position at Paris Las Vegas in Paradise, Nevada. They begin with a dramatic arrival.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A challenge involving scallops earns the winning team a luxury yacht cruise while the losing team clean the kitchen; evening service is catastrophic and one team attempts to rig the elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men compete against the women in a challenge in which they serve classic American fare to special diners. The winning team takes a day trip.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must tackle a challenge in order to get the ingredients they need to cook four different lamb dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to create six dishes of Mexican food from a selection of 25 ingredients. Evening service is also Mexican-themed and more than one person is thrown out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon challenges the contestants to find culinary inspiration from high fashion by creating a menu for some renowned designers. The winning team is rewarded with a brand-new wardrobe while the losing team stays behind.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's the night of the fashion show and some of the chefs become distracted by the models they're cooking for.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are tasked with preparing food for UFC fighter Tito Ortiz and former boxer Sugar Ray Leonard.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's steak night and the contestants must prepare some beef for Chef Ramsey and during a special steakhouse service.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 8
programme.desc: Teamet deltar i det 24 timer lange billøpet Britcar. De tester også en Daihatsu Materia mot en Ascari A1+, og konkurrerer mot BMX-syklister.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 9
programme.desc: Richard forvandler en G-Wiz elektrisk bil til en fjernkontrollert leke, James tester en Jaguar XF saloon, og David Tennant er ukens gjest.

programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James reiser til USA for å legge ut på en episk "road trip" fra San Francisco til Utah med tre av de nyeste muskelbilene.

programme.desc: Top Gear-teamet prøver å finne den perfekte bil for 17-åringer ved å takle forsikringsselskaper, reparasjoner og en gjørmete festivalparkeringsplass.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 707
programme.desc: Louisa er ikke veldig fornøyd når hennes nye kunstlærer Erica vil teste noen ganske alternative ideer på barna, mens dr. Timoney blir involvert i en bilulykke utenfor skolen.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin bestemmer seg for å prøve seg på et forhold, og starter med en forsonende middag, men Louisa er bekymret når Martin ikke klarer å dukke opp.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 801
programme.desc: Forberedelsene til Janice og Penhales bryllup fortsetter, noe som gjør Portwenn gal og Louisa og Martin har flyttet sammen igjen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 802
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa leter etter en barnehage for James og fru Tishell er sjokkert over å oppdage at Al har høyt blodtrykk. Louisa utforsker mulighetene for en ny karriere.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 803
programme.desc: Da Louisa er ute og seiler, må Martin passe på James. Al og Morwenna arrangerer et event for å redde puben.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 804
programme.desc: Louisas første Skype-samtale for hennes nye kurs går ikke som planlagt når Martin bestemmer seg for å fortelle læreren sine tanker om kurset.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 805
programme.desc: Med James i bitestadiet er Martin og Louisa desperate etter mer søvn. Fru Tishell stenger apoteket.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 806
programme.desc: Penhale bestemmer seg for at politiet skal ha åpent hus for å øke samfunnsbevisstheten, men oppmøtet er ikke det han håpet på.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 807
programme.desc: Al og Morwenna deltar i det årlige konsert-kappløpet mot en annen by. Louisa kjøper en ny bil, og Martins blodfobi forårsaker en katastrofe med en pasient.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 808
programme.desc: Martin stenger praktikken en uken før høringen, men pasientene fortsetter å be om rådene hans. En amerikansk turist ber fru Tishell om hjelp, og Penhale bestiller en byste av seg selv.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 901
programme.desc: En representant fra en medisinsk forening kommer for å vurdere Martin og hans helsestasjon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 902
programme.desc: Martin blir tvunget til å gjøre et par oppfriskningskurs, mens Louisa starter en ny karriere.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 903
programme.desc: Louisa planlegger en spesiell kveld for Martins bursdag, men det går ikke som planlagt på grunn av AIs overraskelsesfest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 904
programme.desc: Martin får sin andre vurdering fra legeforeningen, og Buddy forsvinner sporløst. Penhale blir opprørt når hans etterfølger, Mark Mylow, ankommer og prøver å ta over.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 905
programme.desc: Noen har blitt skutt. Penhale starter en etterforskning for å finne gjerningspersonen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 906
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa har sin første fertilitetsavtale, mens Penhale reagerer på et tilfelle av hærverk og får en gratis surfeleksjon.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 907
programme.desc: Fru Tishells unge kusine Sarah Cardy skygger henne på jobb for å få litt arbeidserfaring.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 908
programme.desc: Bryllupsklokkene ringer i Portwenn før Morwenna og Als bryllup. Men noen siste liten problemer truer med spolere dagen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 601
programme.desc: Portwenn er opptatt med å forberede bryllupet til Doc og Louisa. Ruth har problemer med å ta passe på James, og så går strømmen...

programme.title: Melrose Place: Bobby-fellen
programme.desc: Da Alycia Barnett kommer tilbake som Bobbys advokat, flørter Peter med henne for å få investert i Bobbys kabelselskap. Jake tar seg av Jane.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Uten livvakt, del 1 & 2
programme.desc: Da Alycia forteller Bobby at kabel-TV-selskapet hans skylder $2 000 000, tilbyr Amanda seg å hjelpe til. Peter ansetter Sydney som date.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Djevel i våt kjole
programme.desc: Alison og Billy finner Brooke døde i Melroses svømmebasseng. Billy sliter med å komme over dødsfallet, og hjemsøkes av Brookes spøkelse.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Stridens sirkel
programme.desc: Michael frir til Kimberly igjen, og hun får ham til å gi Sydney sparken fra firmaet. Men Sydney slår tilbake med et søksmål.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Løp, Billy
programme.desc: En stadig mer uforsvarlig Billy bestikker Amanda til å doble lønna hans hvis han skaffer enda en stor klient - noe han gjør ved å stjele en kampanjeidé.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Nådeløse mennesker
programme.desc: Alison nekter å gå ned til Billys nivå for å skaffe en ny klient, men hun hopper i søla på en strippeklubb for å få det til uansett.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Den brennende sofaen
programme.desc: Kimberly fortsetter å ha vrangforestillinger som Betsy idet hun tenner på sofaen på strandhuset. Til slutt går hun til Peter for å få hjelp.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Billys triumf
programme.desc: Billy bruker røff taktikk på en kongress da han stjeler kompromitterende bilder av skuespillerinnen Julie Newmar.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Det som går opp må komme ned
programme.desc: På Kimberlys oppfordring tar Peter med seg Michael på en tur til San Diego, der de forfølges av en sleip kvinne ved navn Teri Carson.
programme.sub-title: Det som går opp må komme ned

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sanne hvite løgner
programme.desc: Teri Carson kommer til Los Angeles for å ta hevn på Michael og Peter for datterens tap i konkurransen.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Melrose i kaos
programme.desc: Amanda og Peter forsones endelig etter at hun løser hans juridiske problemer med Teri. Michael tilstår å ha vært utro.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Peters artige eventyr
programme.desc: Peter havner i et levende helvete da han tiltales for drapet på Bobby og tas til fange av schizofrene Kimberly.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Full Metal Betsy
programme.desc: På asylet sjarmerer Peter pleier Benson for å flykte før Kimberly/Betsy får operert ham. Amanda og Michael fortsetter å lete etter Kimberly og Peter.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Vandøde søstre
programme.desc: Micahel og Amanda havner i fare da de bryter seg inn på Willowbrook asyl for å redde Peter fra Kimberly/Betsy.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Å leve med katastrofe
programme.desc: Dagen etter at Jane og Sydney forsøker å drepe Richard melder Jane ham savnet. Men den ikke avdøde Richard begynner å trakassere henne.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Over Dicks lik
programme.desc: Jane og Sydney fortsetter å bli trakassert av Richard, som til slutt konfronterer dem på gravplassen.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Overtredelser
programme.desc: Jane og Sydneys konfrontasjon med Richard får en sjokkerende slutt da Richard blir drept av en politimann før han dreper dem.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Konfrontasjon på Casa Diablo, del 1
programme.desc: Det oppstår kamp mellom Walker og et par voldelige brødre som leder et narkokartell.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Konfrontasjon på Casa Diablo, del 2
programme.desc: Kampen fortsetter mellom Walker og de narkolangende Ortega-brødrene, som har kidnappet Alex og Sydney.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Utrdikningslaget
programme.desc: Walkers utdrikningslag, en helg med camping med Trivette og Gage, blir avbrutt av en grizzlybjørn som har fått smaken på mennesker og av en voldelig forbryter som vil hindre rangerne i å vitne i rettssaken mot ham.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bryllupsklokker, del 1
programme.desc: Walker og Alex gifter seg endelig i en vakker og rørende seremoni – men først må de overleve dødelige leiemordere som truer med å ødelegge bryllupet og livene deres.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bryllupsklokker, del 2
programme.desc: Walker og Alex gifter seg endelig i en vakker og rørende seremoni – men først må de overleve dødelige leiemordere som truer med å ødelegge bryllupet og livene deres.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: De modiges hjem
programme.desc: Nyfødte babyer blir kidnappet fra det lokale sykehuset like etter at de ble født.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hevnens engel
programme.desc: Når en profesjonell brytervenn av Trivette blir drept i en mystisk ulykke, må Walker og Trivette finne morderne og knuse syndikatet som står bak drapet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Dødelig situasjon
programme.desc: En lokal politibetjent holder Alex som gissel, og Walker må finne ut av sannheten og roe ned gisselsituasjonen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hvit bøffel
programme.desc: En statue feller det som ser ut som ekte tårer, og Walker må finne ut hvorfor.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Forandringens vind
programme.desc: Walker havner på ukjent territorium når en senator ber ham fakke en hacker.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lasarus
programme.desc: Undercover-agenter blir fortsatt henrettet, og Walker må finne den kriminelle bakmannen, kalt "Chairman", som står bak drapene.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vendepunkt
programme.desc: Texas Rangers har hendene fulle når de går etter makkerne til "Chairman", den kriminelle hjernen bak drapene på undercoveragenter.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gjengjeldelse
programme.desc: Walker står endelig overfor "The Chairman", den kriminelle hjernen bak drapene på undercoveragenter, når Alex blir kidnappet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Håpets barn
programme.desc: Når Alex finner et forlatt spedbarn, blir hun og Walker plutselig foreldre.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Tro
programme.desc: Walker og gjengen må finne en ambulanse som har donorleveren som kan redde en ung jente.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Gullgutt
programme.desc: Walker hjelper en ung bokser med å komme seg bort fra gata og inn i ringen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Desperate valg
programme.desc: Fanger på rømmen skapet kaos i Texas, og Walker må stoppe dem og sende dem tilbake til fengselet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Avledningsgaten
programme.desc: To rivaliserende gjenger samles ved å konkurrere på basketballbanen istedenfor på gata.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lørdagskveld
programme.desc: Walker trår til når mafiaen tvinger en lokal middagsklubb til å hvitvaske penger.

programme.title: I krig med bestefar
programme.desc: Peter er en vanlig gutt som går i 6. klasse. Han liker å game og henge med vennene sine. Men når bestefaren Ed flytter inn i familiens hus, blir Peter tvunget til å gi bestefar rommet sitt.

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: Den avdankede sheriffen i en liten by i Georgia, Ben Watts, blir presset til raskt å løse en gisselsituasjon – og innser snart at han er en brikke i et større spill blant byens skumle hemmeligheter.

programme.title: Parker
programme.desc: En kompromissløs mestertyv blir forrådt av medhjelperne og overlatt for å dø. Han utgir seg for å være en annen og samarbeider med en kvinne på innsiden for å sikre seg det seneste kuppet til gjengen.

programme.title: 97 Minutes
programme.desc: Et kapret fly vil styrte om bare 97 minutter når det går tom for drivstoff. NSA-direktøren vil at flyet skal skytes ned før den tid, og overlater skjebnen til de uskyldige passasjerene til en hemmelig Interpol-agent.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Den tidligere CIA-agenten Robert bor på et hemmelig feriested for tidligere spioner. Nå er hans sønn Paul havnet i trøbbel og trenger hans hjelp. Dessverre er ikke Pauls planer så hemmelige som livet til faren.

programme.title: The Ice Road
programme.desc: Etter at en fjerntliggende diamantgruve kollapser i Nord-Canada tar Mike oppdraget med å lede redningsoperasjonen, og må trosse de brutale naturkreftene i Canadas villmark.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Eks-agenten Bryan Mills er forsont med sin tidligere kone, men lykken blir kortvarig når hun brutalt myrdes og han blir beskyldt for udåden.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Wildfire: Mothers
programme.desc: Kris' mother Barb pays an unexpected visit to Raintree.

programme.title: Wildfire: Guilty
programme.desc: Kris feels responsible when Oklahoma Crude is injured during a work out race with Wildfire so she gets a job at a local diner to help out, although it might not be enough.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Claiming Race
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a high stakes horse race, Kris falls for Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Kris and her companions track lost horses in the woods while the Ritter family grows emotionally.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Track
programme.desc: Kris investigates the seamy underworld of the race track after Wildfire comes down with colic.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Party
programme.desc: Kris makes an unexpected but crucial discovery about her past when an old friend arrives.

programme.title: Wildfire: Identity
programme.desc: When she gets thrown off a horse and injured, Kris herself realizes that a career as a jockey might come at a high price.

programme.title: Wildfire: Tina Sharp
programme.desc: Kris turns to painkillers to cope with her injury when the possibility of riding in an upcoming race is contingent upon her getting better.

programme.title: Wildfire: Impressions
programme.desc: Kris and Junior are getting more serious as Junior invites Kris to have dinner with the Davis'.

programme.title: Wildfire: Loyalty
programme.desc: Kris is hired to ride Wildfire although she struggles to remain focused because of her relationship with Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Try It Without The Porsche
programme.desc: Kris meets Kerry Connelly, a sports agent who takes interest in Kris after the results of the Sandpiper Race.

programme.title: Wildfire: Opportunity Knocks
programme.desc: On the heels of her dramatic second place finish in the Sandpiper Race, Kris is offered an opportunity to star in a commercial with Wildfire, which unexpectedly thrusts Kris and Junior together.

programme.title: Wildfire: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly returns to Camp LaGrange for an event at the Equestrian Center where she first met Wildfire.
programme.sub-title: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find

programme.title: Wildfire: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: Kris is left alone in charge of Raintree when Jean goes on a trip with Charlie, Matt goes with Dani to help her look into a new racehorse, and Pablo investigates a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Wildfire: Family Matters
programme.desc: With Pablo away, Matt trains Kris for her first turf race on Wildfire while simultaneously secretly training Wildfire's competition, Dani's horse Picaro.

programme.title: Wildfire: Nothing Takes The Past Away Like The Future
programme.desc: When Raintree takes on a well-known horse to train, Kris and Matt work together to figure out the horse's problem, only to discover the real reason Pablo wants nothing to do with it.
programme.sub-title: Nothing Takes The Past Away Like The Future

programme.title: Wildfire: Taking Off
programme.desc: Kris learns a lesson in the jockey life as she works under a renowned but demanding trainer.

programme.title: Wildfire: Fear
programme.desc: Kris must turn to Junior for help when she is asked to throw a race by John Zack, the figure from Pablo's past.

programme.title: Wildfire: Break Down
programme.desc: Kris finds herself racing Dani's horse Picaro against Wildfire, as the result of a promise she made.

programme.title: Wildfire: 51/49
programme.desc: Kris deals with crisis of confidence after events of pile-up, as Junior and Dani find out startling news about their father, Matt struggles with revealing info regarding the cause of pile-up with Kris

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness

programme.title: On the Case: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy is murdered in his bed in the middle of the night. Police suspect the child's mother. Over the next 9 years there will be accusations, a confession and a conviction but will justice be served?

programme.title: On the Case: Veil of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beloved husband and father is found executed in front of his home.

programme.title: On the Case: Twice Is No Accident
programme.desc: When Fran Smith mysteriously disappears her sister and daughter mount their own investigation... What they uncover sends police on a cross country man hunt for a killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely murdered, police must retrace her last steps alive to identify her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Promise Kept
programme.desc: A cold-case detective reopens a decades-old murder case and promises to get justice on behalf of the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: Evidence of Deception
programme.desc: When a beautiful college coed is found dead in her dorm room police discover a crime scene where nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: A Nightmare in Idaho Falls
programme.desc: Reeda Roundy and Betty Gray are found murdered in Roundy's home, along with a message written in blood, saying `Satan Loves You'. Detectives piece together the stunning truth behind the murders with insights provided by the victims' families.

programme.title: On the Case: A Deadly Secret
programme.desc: A small town hair dresser is found beaten and strangled in her beauty salon. After the investigation goes cold, an act of conscience cracks the case.

programme.title: On the Case: She Wasn't Alone
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is viciously murdered just 24 hours after she was engaged to be married.

programme.title: On the Case: A Terrible Secret
programme.desc: A bed sheet may prove to be the key to solving the murder of a 13-year-old girl who is found strangled on a riverbank.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in the Sun
programme.desc: When Kenny Baker returns home, the backdoor is ajar and his wife, Kathy, and two-year-old son, Ryan, are nowhere to be found.

programme.title: On the Case: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: Police retrace a young woman's final movements with hope that it will lead them straight to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Footage
programme.desc: An innocent mother of two is mysteriously shot in downtown Philadelphia. Surveillance cameras record every detail but can't unmask the killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: A cold case team reopens the investigation into the murder of 36-year-old Linda Robinson who is savagely murdered while her seven-year-old niece is asleep in the next room.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Pelham
programme.desc: A daughter spends 25 years pursuing the truth behind her mother's mysterious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A young woman's mysterious murder sends detectives on a heartbreaking search for the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: At Death's Door
programme.desc: After a single mother is viciously attacked and left for dead, she still manages to help police track down her assailant.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder at Loose Chippings
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple is found dead in their stately Virginia home, investigators are taken on a wild journey around the globe before they uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: On the Case: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: When Rhonda Boggs is discovered murdered in her own kitchen, police get an important lead from the only witness to the crime, Rhonda's two year old daughter.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shut Down
programme.desc: Joe receives a negative visit from Transport Canada when inspectors threaten to shut down the airline. Ray and the Electra crew fly to Sachs Harbour to pick up a unique load - the hides, wool, and meat of 250 musk oxen.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Tale of Two Pilots
programme.desc: Weighed down by the responsibility of training a new rampie, and struggling to get out of Joe's doghouse, DC-3 co-pilot Tyler gets a once in a lifetime opportunity to stunt fly in his Cessna 150 for a visiting film crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Jam
programme.desc: After taking command of an intense airlift, and dealing with the ugliest Electra load he's ever seen, Scott takes a scary fall on the icy tarmac.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Very Buffalo Christmas
programme.desc: A week before Christmas, Buffalo agrees to lend a hand to an RCMP initiative to fly toys to isolated communities in the north. But a series of problems with the Electra leave the company in a jam.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Just months from retiring, Electra captain Ray Weber leads his crew on a multi-trip mission that requires landing on a rough ice strip on a remote lake.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: For Sale By Owner
programme.desc: When South Korean buyers come to Buffalo to look at a water bomber, the pressure is on mechanic Cory to get the plane ready. But a landing gear emergency puts him and chief pilot Justin in serious danger.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Over Seas
programme.desc: Buffalo has to get a CL-215 water bomber to buyers in Korea. So Justin and Cory fly the plane to Vancouver Harbour, where it will be hoisted onto a cargo ship sailing across the Pacific Ocean to its destination a method of delivery no one has ever tried.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Water Wings
programme.desc: In South Korea, Cory and Justin meet the ship delivering Buffalo's water bomber plane to new buyers there. But the boys are frustrated by the buyers' poor planning.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra returns from repairs and the crew takes it right back to the ice strip that it set off from before the crash landing last year. Tyler works up the courage to confront Joe about a big decision. A hotshot Australian pilot tries to earn a job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Facing Joe's wrath, Rod and Cory head to the UK to make urgent water bomber repairs. David tries to prove himself to Devan in the C-46 but ends up infuriating Devan. Will makes an ultimatum in Hay River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Camp
programme.desc: Mikey trains for High Arctic survival with the Canadian Rangers. The Air Force invades Chuck's hangar. Joe faces tough competition at a California plane auction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Solid
programme.desc: AJ and James battle a DC-4 engine fire. It's Joe's 69th birthday - and he's never flown a helicopter before, so Mikey plans a special gift of chopper flight lessons.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompens Första Kronhjort
programme.desc: Jompen är i Sörmland på drevjakt. Vi får skjuta mufflon, kronhjort, vildsvin, och rådjur. Efter lunch får Jompen syn på den magiska kronhjorten.

programme.title: Vilterian: Älgentrecote
programme.desc: Denna gång står älgentrecote på menyn, en höstig rätt med skogschampinjoner, potatiskaka och en härlig pepparsås. Häng med!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Höstens Bästa Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen och Pierre befinner sig på en fantastisk drevjakt på vildsvin och dovhjort. Vi är Östergötland på en av årets första drevjakter. Tillsammans skjuter Pierre och Jompen flera vildsvin och dovhjortar.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Jagar Kronhjort & Rådjursjakt Med Tax
programme.desc: Pierre längtar tillbaka till jakten på kronhjorten och ger sig ut på smygjakt på samma jaktmarker som senast! Ännu en fantastiskt jaktfilm i världsklass från Pierre helt enkelt.
programme.sub-title: Pierre Jagar Kronhjort & Rådjursjakt Med Tax

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Ett år av drevjakt
programme.desc: Säsongens sista drevjakt med Danne. Vildsvin, älg, kronhjortar, rådjur, dovhjortar och räv - ja helt enkelt galet mycket under samma jakt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Och Kattis Pyrschar Dov
programme.desc: Pierre och Kattis ger sig ut på pyrsch med sikte på dov.

programme.title: Vilterian: Råbiff
programme.desc: Alexander Lundin är tillbaks i rutan med ännu ett härligt recept! Denna gång blir det en råbiff på älg som passar perfekt både som huvudrätt och förrätt. Luta dig tillbaka och bli inspirerad!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vi Besöker Swedish Game Fair
programme.desc: Missade du årets grymmaste jaktmässa Game fair? Inga problem! Hela jakt är jakt är på plats på årets game fair och du får hänga med Jompen när han letar efter mässans höjdpunkter.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Södermanland
programme.desc: Vi är på årets sista drevjakt.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vildsvinsjakt På Ridön
programme.desc: Jompen är bjuden till vildsvinsjakt på Ridön och tar med sig sin goda vän Anders på en upplevelse dom sent kommer glömma!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt Ems Herrgård & Aska The Dog - Del 4

programme.sub-title: Drevjakt Ems Herrgård & Aska The Dog - Del 4

programme.title: Vilterian: Hjortlägg
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt lagar vi rimmat, grillat & confiterat hjortlägg med Tottie ute på Hammartorp. Han bjuder även på en Dovhjorts-ceviche som vanligtvis görs på fisk. Häng med och bli inspirerad!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen är ute på jaktturne. Drevjakt på vildsvin o dovhjort står på menyn.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vi Grillar På En Båt & Vildsvinsjakt

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt I Namibia & Sommarjakt På Vildsvin
programme.desc: Pierre reser till Namibia för jakt på Oryx, Springbock och Red hartebeest. Det blir magiska dagar och många både fina och spännande jaktsekvenser.
programme.sub-title: Jakt I Namibia & Sommarjakt På Vildsvin

programme.title: Vilterian: Pulled Wildboar
programme.desc: Bli suktad av ett makalöst recept på Pulled-Wildboar-Burger.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Aska The Dog - Del 3 & Råbocksjakt
programme.desc: Valpen - Aska, en jakthunds resa.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bäverjakt & Pyrsch På Råbock
programme.desc: Lubbe jagar bäver vid en sjö i Södermanland. Utan båt eller fiskespö, vilket han bittert fick ångra.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt I Spannmål & Radiogrisen
programme.desc: Pierre ger sig ut i spannmålen på jakt efter vildsvin.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt hos Kattis

programme.title: Vilterian: Wellington
programme.desc: Tottie växlar upp denna vecka och gör en Wellington - på vildsvin!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Kråkjakt
programme.desc: Jompen åker och träffar Kråk-Micke för en härlig dag i kråkskogen med skratt och kamratskap. Häng på!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Ultimata prylfilmen 2.0
programme.desc: Favorit i repris! Vi går igenom våra jaktprylar, alltifrån vapen, hundförarprylar, jaktkläder osv. Bland annat några gamla favoriter som hängt med genom åren men även lite nyheter på marknaden. Häng med!

programme.desc: Jompen och Calle jagar, fiskar och lagar i Skåne - Småviltsjakt med rök och grill. Vi är mitt i Skåne hos Carl på Blommeröd stuteri.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt Hos Kattis
programme.desc: Under tre dagar tältar han i djupa minusgrader för att maximera sina chanser att få tag på den svårfångade Tjädern.

programme.desc: Lindsay, NY-direktøren for en veldedighetsorganisasjon, blir kalt til kongeriket Veronia for å intervjues for jobben som sjef for hele operasjonen. Under intervjuprosessen finner hun ekte kjærlighet med prinsen.

programme.title: Joy for Christmas
programme.desc: Når familiebedriftens årlige julekjøring er i fare, må Holly overbevise proffidrettsutøveren Jack Kane om å være det offentlige ansiktet til kampanjen for å redde den

programme.title: A Furry Little Christmas
programme.desc: En veterinær fra storbyen faller for en provinslege når han prøver å gjenskape en New York-jul i hjembyen hennes i Vermont.

programme.title: A Lot Like Christmas
programme.desc: Etter å ikke ha sett familien på over 7 år, blir PJ overtalt til å reise hjem til jul av kollegene sine. Når han ankommer får han kontakt med kjæresten sin fra videregående, Rebecca.

programme.title: Memories of Christmas
programme.desc: Når Noelle arver morens hus, oppdager hun at moren hennes hadde ansatt Dave for å dekorere huset til jul. Klarar han å overbevise henne om å fortsette tradisjonen og få tilbake julegleden?

programme.title: Candy Coated Christmas
programme.desc: En ung kvinne vender tilbake til morens hjemby Peppermint Hollow etter at planene hennes om å starte en bedrift har gått i vasken.

programme.title: A Chestnut Family Christmas
programme.desc: En privat kokk må finne på noe for å imponere den ambisiøse familien hennes før de kommer for å tilbringe jul med henne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.
programme.sub-title: Just Another Day at the Shore

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Melissa Joan Hart, Trick Daddy, Jewel
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jewel, Melissa Joan Hart and Trick Daddy.
programme.sub-title: Melissa Joan Hart, Trick Daddy, Jewel

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Redman, Eddie George, Howie Dorough
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Redman, Howie (Backstreet Boys) and Eddie George - NFL.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Chyna, Usher, Tony Hawk.

programme.title: Made: Punk Rocker
programme.desc: Straight-A goody goody, Gracie Moreau wants to get noticed by being MADE into a Punk Rocker.

programme.title: Made: Ladies Man
programme.desc: A dorky, desperate, hygienically challenged senior wants to land his very first date and kiss by being MADE into an irresistible chick magnet. The catch? He has to get a girl to ask HIM out to the school dance.

programme.title: Made: Prom Queen - Kristy
programme.desc: Kristy McCallan wants to break out of her shy shell and dazzle her doubters by being MADE into a cool and confident Prom Queen.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Missed your Sweet 16? Throw a Sweet 18! That's what these triplets did when planning their Vegas themed birthday. Dealing with these three sisters means triple the drama!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: A private jet to Vegas for dress shopping, 100% pure silver invitations and a hot VIP list is Lila's dream come true. So why did her mom go and hire those Latin dancers?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Years ago Jazmin lived in foster care. Now she's living large thanks to having been adopted by rich parents, and she's anxious to have a Sweet 16 to make up for all of the birthdays she's missed.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Bjorn is a divo who wants to have a hot fashion party at his local mall. But will nerves and being seriously late ruin his party?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf
programme.desc: "Wee Man" Acuna and Jack Osbourne are given a hard time by MTV security, Pink thinks she is being framed by her boyfriend, Carey Hart, for running a motorcycle "chop shop" and Stephen Dorff (Blade) is set up to get stuck with an $8,000 bar tab.
programme.sub-title: Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Missy Elliot, Hilary Duff, Usher
programme.desc: Missy Elliott gets caught up in a bling sting when her jewel-encrusted dog tags are given to the wrong messenger, Hilary Duff gets a driver's education when her car gets jacked by the Punk'd crew. Also, Usher's brother is picked up for shoplifting...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow
programme.desc: Nick Carter thinks he's punking his friend Tommy Lee, only to find out tables have been turned on him, Tommy Lee thinks he and his friend Nick Carter are going for a test drive only to find that they've been involved in a hit and run Punk'd Style...
programme.sub-title: Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Mya, Katie Holmes, Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Mya gets up close and personal with her biggest fan, Katie Holmes (Dawson's Creek) gets involved in a torrid love triangle and Tracy Morgan (The Tracy Morgan Show) gets his car towed when the Punk'd valet crew parks his ride in the red zone.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa
programme.desc: Tour the homes of the hottest new stars from the movie Slackers. Features tours of the homes of James King, Laura Prepon and Devon Sawa.
programme.sub-title: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse

programme.title: Made: Moto-X
programme.desc: Kaitlin Smith wants to shed her girly girl reputation and find her inner strength by being MADE into a rough and tough motocross racer!

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder Comes Knocking
programme.desc: In July 2004, Jarrod Davidson was shot to death outside his California apartment. Estranged from his ex-wife, Kelee, Jarrod had been seeking full custody of his daughter. After further investigation, Kelee’s parents were arrested for the murder of Jarrod.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Without Mercy
programme.desc: On November 29, 2005, firemen put out a fire in a house in Morgantown, West Virginia -- and discovered the charred remains of Jimmy Michael and his wife Shelly. A medical examiner’s report found that Jimmy was dead before the blaze had even started.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Drawn to Murder - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part report on the February 1987 murder of 37-year-old Peggy Hettrick in Fort Collins, Colorado. Her mutilated, half-naked body was discovered in a field near the home of Tim Masters, a 15-year-old who lived near the crime scene.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crazy Love
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hollywood Ripper on Trial
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the murder of Vanessa Mintz, who was gunned down at the family owned Saluda Mountain Lodge, in Saluda, North Carolina on Saturday, February 19, 2011.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Maria Spencer's Vow to Kill
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Kidnapped - Shawn Hornbeck's Incredible Story
programme.desc: In 2002, 11-year-old Shawn Hornbeck was kidnapped while riding his bicycle in his hometown of Richwoods, Missouri. Over the course of the next four and a half years, he was held captive and sexually abused by his abductor, Michael Devlin.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cold As Ice
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Side of Paradise
programme.desc: A report about Don North, a free spirit who took to the waters of the Caribbean, living among the tight-knit "cruiser community", a group of individuals who choose to live their lives on the water.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Letter
programme.desc: In 1998, police in Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin were called to the home of Mark and Julie Jensen. Mark said he had found his wife dead in her bed. But a letter written by Julie before her death expressed her suspicion that Mark might kill her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Janet's Secret
programme.desc: A report on the murder of Janet Walsh and the 34-year search to find her killer, as new forensics technology allows detectives to re-examine evidence left from the initial investigation into the death of the Monaca, Pennsylvania woman in 1979.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Vendetta
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson

programme.title: 48 Hours: FindJodi!
programme.desc: A report on new information in the search for Iowa television anchor Jodi Huisentruit, who disappeared on her way to work on June 27, 1995.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder on the Dark Web
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part report on the alarming world of murder-for-hire on the mysterious "dark web," exposes an international criminal organization in a hunt for a self-described murder mastermind named Yura.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Kidnapping of Michelle and Breea Renee
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Kidnapping of Michelle and Breea Renee

programme.title: 48 Hours: Blood Feud
programme.desc: Nancy Seaman, an award-winning teacher living in Farmington Hills, Michigan was accused of the 2004 hatchet/stabbing murder of her husband, Bob. She admits killing him, but says it was self-defense, claiming that he had been abusing her for years.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Shadow of Death
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
