programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Manners Suck / Pipe Of Doom
programme.desc: Mr. Van Driessen gives his class a lesson in manners that no one will ever forget. He punches out the etiquette teacher. / Butt-head gets stuck in a construction site pipe, a la Baby Jessica.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nyren / Den gode handling
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis ødelegger nyren og en donor fra hans fortid redder dagen./ Beavis og Butt-Head utfører sin første gode gjerning ved å ha DDT i bowlen på skoledansen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head miss the schoolbus home / The duo makes a Late Night Show / Beavis and Butt-Head are invited to play football
programme.sub-title: Shortcuts / Late Night with Butt-Head / Butt, Butt Hike!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Tak / Elv
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head blir sittende fast på taket av Tom Andersons hus./ Beavis og Butt-Head seiler på dekk i en elv og ender opp på sjøen.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Crush / Young, Gifted & Crude
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head want to hang with a "really cool' bunch of delinquents. / Beavis & Butt-head spend some time with the school's gifted class. Not much time.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Choke / Career day
programme.desc: Eating chicken can be hazardous / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand
programme.sub-title: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer
programme.sub-title: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school
programme.sub-title: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cuts Begin
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må sende ti jenter hjem for å komme ned til troppens magiske 36. Tilpassingen av drakter viser Kelli hvem som har alt. Når de begynner å sende folk hjem, knuses drømmer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Becoming World Class
programme.desc: Jentene får DCC-looken, som er til hjelp for noen, men ikke andre. To gjester overrasker på treningen og rocker DCCs verden. Kelli opplever en av de pinligste kontorsbesøkene noensinne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Having A Bad Day
programme.desc: Cameo- og showgruppe-uttak presser de nye og veteranene til bristepunktet. Melissa Rycroft forsøker å redde en DCC som henger i en tynn tråd, og et besøk på Kellis kontor avsluttes på en sjokkerende måte.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Cutting Board
programme.desc: Følelsene stormer når Kelli og Judy må ta vanskelige valg og sende folk hjem for å beholde troppens kvalitet. Melissa Rycroft deler ut uvurderlige råd.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Kelli kunngjør endelig troppen. Skader truer starten på Cowboys treningsleir. Kaos på kampdagen kan ødelegge for jentene når opptredenen må være feilfri.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Drømmen starter
programme.desc: Hundrevis av vakre og talentfulle håpefulle ankommer for å prøve å bli verdens beste heiagjeng. Samtidig søker mange av jentene som må dra, forsoning.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Nydebut-jentene
programme.desc: Veteranene kjemper for plassene mens de nye prøver å leve drømmene og gjennomgå treningsleiren til DCC. De stilles overfor panelintervjuer, soloer, en slitsom dansekombinasjon og et rom med tøffe dommere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dette er sværingene
programme.desc: De nye kandidatene får en tankevekker om hva det innebærer å være en DCC. Jentene kjemper for å lære dansene. Melissa Rycroft treffer nykommerne for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Time to Push
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit; Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship; stress increases on makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Big Surprises
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up; uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show approach; two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dance Intervention
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko; Kitty Carter rocks some of the candidate's worlds; cameos give Kelli and Judy a fresh perspective on the girls; at Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Rehearsals with the Stars
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp comes to an end; Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake; Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Squad announcement feels bittersweet as some favorites go home; the team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting; Game Day arrives.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Judge's Showcase
programme.desc: Lagets største og mest talentfulle klassen på treningsleiren må imponere DCC-dommerne med soloer og gruppedans for å få være med. Melissa Rycroft er også med.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: You Came To Play!
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft kommer til første øvelse for å lete etter artistmentorer. Så rusker Brittany Perry-Russell opp i kandidatene med koreografien sin.. Med Melissa Rycroft og Brittany Perry-Russell.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Call the Medic!
programme.desc: Kandidatene får lære teknikker så sparkene blir ennå høyere. Kelli blir urolig for en kandidat da Evan Miller underviser i hurtigkoreografi. Med Melissa Page og Evan Miller.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I sluttuttaket er konkurransen beinhard. Nå må de som har overlevd, konkurrere mot erfarne veteraner om en av de ettertraktede plassene på DCCs treningsleir.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Treningsleiren er i gang! De nye kandidatene er spente, og kanskje fulle av beundring, når de treffer veteranene for første gang på Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Etter bare to uker på treningsleiren må noen elimineres. Men først skal jentene prøve draktene. Det er et bittersøtt øyeblikk for nykommerne siden de ennå ikke har gjort seg fortjent til dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201
programme.desc: En augustdag i 1996 blir den 20 år gamle hotellarbeideren Trude Espås observert sittende på en stein ikke langt unna Geiranger sentrum. 11 dager senere blir hun funnet drept.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 501
programme.desc: Gjenopptakelseskommisjonen har siden 2018 vurdert om Norges mest kjente drapssak skal etterforskes på ny. Skal det endelig lykkes Per og Veronica Orderud å få gjenopptatt saken?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 302
programme.desc: I september 2003 blir en gutt seksuelt misbrukt av en mann i trappeoppgangen der han bor. Politiet starter en intens jakt på mannens identitet for å få stoppet ham. Samtidig kommer det stadig inn nye meldinger om overgrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 402
programme.desc: En sommerdag i 1999 sykler tolv år gamle Kristin Juel Johannessen hjemmefra på vei til badestranda. Samme kveld blir hun meldt savnet. Hvor har den unge jenta tatt veien?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 705
programme.desc: Psykolog Helena Bering forsvinner sporløst midt på dagen den 18. august 2004. Hun har nettopp avsluttet et møte med en klient på klinikken i Stockholm, når alle spor etter henne forsvinner.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 503
programme.desc: I 2007 kommer en mann og hans mor inn på politistasjonen i Bergen for å underrette om at hans kone, Dung Tran Larsen, har vært savnet i en uke. Hva skjedde egentlig med Dung?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 303
programme.desc: Tidlig på 90-tallet rystes den norske befolkningen av flere kirkebranner. I 1993 blir Øystein Aarseth funnet død i en trappeoppgang i Oslo. Politiet retter søkelyset mot enkelte personer i black-metal-miljøet. En av disse er Varg Vikernes.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lucy & Lizzie
programme.desc: Lucy the Dalmatian snarls at larger dogs then turns in circles and attacks her own tail. Lizzie, a Red Tick Elizabethan Beagle, is obsessed with running, inside or outside.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Teddy, and Matilda
programme.desc: Lab/Staffordshire mix unfriendly to small animals; a poodle that can't stop running in circles; bulldog obsessed with attaching skateboard wheels.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren
programme.desc: A Min Pin turns ferocious. Actress Denise Richards' pug gets overprotective and aggressive towards visitors. A stubborn Bassett Hound has to literally be dragged places he doesn't want to go.
programme.sub-title: Chip, Leo, Hank, Lucy and Betty

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Spike, Jake & Nugget, and Wendel
programme.desc: A wedding date is cancelled because the dogs can't get along; a German Shepherd that's so aggressive, even the German Shepherd rescue center won't take him; Sheltie barks at everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eppie, Lady, and Snoopy
programme.desc: A Beagle with a passion for boogie boarding, a Dalmatian/German shepherd dangerously protective of her owner; Lab/Beagle mix that became aggressive after moving to a new area.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Major Jones, Josie, and Scrappy
programme.desc: Catchup with the hurricane Katrina rescue dogs. Is a reunion with their owners in store for any of them? A German Shephard learns to walk on a leash. A lab won’t walk on hardwood floors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Princess Cujo, Prada, and Bearz
programme.desc: Los Angeles Lakers executive Jeanie Buss asks Cesar to take the "Cujo" out of Princess. Prada, a pampered Pomeranian throws vicious temper tantrums, and Bearz, a Rottweiler attacks shopping carts.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.
programme.sub-title: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Vicky & Taz, Punkin, and Maddy
programme.desc: Vicious Min Pins endanger a couple's home-based business; Pit Bull mix develops an unhealthy obsession with rocks; Cesar helps an adopted Terrier mix overcome her fear of men.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Children's Story
programme.desc: Catherine learns that the city's model foster home for children is hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: An Impossible Silence
programme.desc: When she witnesses a shooting, a deaf girl must decide whether to abandon the sanctuary of the City Below to free an innocent man.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Chimes at Midnight
programme.desc: After Vincent entrusts Snow's ring to Diana, she quickly discovers Gabriel's henchman have targeted her and soon kidnap her and take her to Gabriel.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.
programme.sub-title: In the Forests of the Night

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Extra Innings
programme.desc: Ex-baseball player Ed Hamler, lame from an injury and forced to retire early is given a 1909 baseball card of a player that looks exactly like him. The card is magical in that he becomes drawn into it and lives out the life of the player in the past.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Crossing
programme.desc: A stressed-out priest repeatedly encounters a station wagon containing a young girl. The car keeps crashing and bursting into flames.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunters
programme.desc: A young boy falls into an undiscovered cave near a housing project. An archeologist studies strange paintings on its walls and then bizarre things begin to happen. Cave items move around and animals are killed and brought into the cave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dream Me a Life
programme.desc: A man in a retirement home dreams of a woman holding back a monster, and in real life realizes the woman is his cataleptic neighbor.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Memories
programme.desc: A hypnotist who specializes in helping people relive their past lives tries to find her own history. She hypnotizes herself and when she awakens, she learns that everyone can now remember their past lives. They also desperately want to forget them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hellgramite Method
programme.desc: An alcoholic goes through an extremely painful and potentially deadly cure for his drinking problem. He has to choose which is more important - the bottle or his life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Our Selina is Dying
programme.desc: A young woman, Debra, comes to live with her mysterious family, including the dying patriarch Selena. After Selena clutches Debra's hand firmly leaving an odd spot on it, Debra begins to age very fast while Selena rejuvenates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: There Was an Old Woman
programme.desc: A writer of children's books gives a book to a sick young fan. Later, she starts hearing the sound of children in her house.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trunk
programme.desc: A young man at a motel discovers an empty trunk that grants any wishes. He uses it for popularity, but at a party he discovers who his true friends are.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Appointment on route 17
programme.desc: After finishing a heart transplant, a man finds his personality has changed. He also discovers that he has a strange attraction to a waitress at a road diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Cold Equations
programme.desc: A rescue pilot on the frontiers of space is faced with unpleasant prospects when he finds an innocent stowaway on his ship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: It's a Good Life
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Deaths-Head Revisited
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stranger in Possum Meadows
programme.desc: A young boy playing in a field meets an old man who is really an alien collecting specimens to bring back to his planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Street of Shadows
programme.desc: While taking a walk in a wealthy neighborhood, an unemployed man living in a shelter experiences an unusual transformation

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Something in the Walls
programme.desc: A doctor arrives at his new job in a sanitarium. He discovers the case of a woman who is terribly frightened of things that appear on her walls.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.
programme.sub-title: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses Libby’s likeness to promote a community service program, the real Libby manages to steal the limelight.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: First Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s first kiss becomes a test of true love when Harvey is turned into a frog.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Meeting Dad's Girlfriend
programme.desc: Love definitely isn’t in the air when Sabrina meets her dad’s new girlfriend.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves
programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.
programme.sub-title: Oh What A Tangled Spell She Weaves

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus
programme.desc: A special visitor from the Other Realm helps Sabrina recapture the true spirit of Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft
programme.desc: Tired of Mr. Kraft’s harsh rules, Sabrina concocts a potion to make him act like a teenager.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: 5 Easy Pieces Of Libby
programme.desc: Libby is even harder to figure out after Sabrina accidentally turns her into a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finger Lickin’ Flu
programme.desc: Sabrina catches the flu in her pointing finger and accidentally transfers her magic to a teacher.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina & The Beanstalk
programme.desc: Sabrina’s beanstalk is right out of a fairytale, but it’s more like a nightmare for Harvey

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Roland the troll takes Valentine’s Day too far when he steals Sabrina’s heart.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Band Show
programme.desc: Egos soar out of control when Sabrina uses magic to become a rock star.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: When Teens Collide
programme.desc: When Sabrina switches personalities with Libby, she uses her magic and newly found popularity.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: My Nightmare The Car
programme.desc: A talking car causes Sabrina a big headache.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Every Witch Way but Loose

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Double Time

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Heart of the Matter
programme.desc: When Sabrina realizes she has been turning down guys right and left since her break up with Harvey, she casts a spell to turn herself into a dating machine.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Can’t Twin

programme.title: JAG: Boot
programme.desc: A woman Marine recruit dies at Parris Island. Harm investigates while Meg poses undercover as a recruit.

programme.title: JAG: The Brotherhood
programme.desc: During a landing exercise Marines find a beaten, comatose fellow Marine on the beach

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.title: JAG: Smoked
programme.desc: After a lightning strike, an F-14 wanders into Cuban airspace, and Cuban fighters force it to land

programme.title: JAG: Black Ops
programme.desc: A Naval aviator, while temporarily assigned to a SEAL team, drowns at sea; he was the son of a woman senator.

programme.title: JAG: Survivors
programme.desc: In a civilian court Harm represents a divorced (and emotionally baffled) Marine colonel, who has gotten into trouble over an unauthorized visit with his minor son.

programme.title: JAG: Recovery
programme.desc: A Navy astronaut dies during a drill while preparing for a space mission to repair a satellite

programme.title: JAG: Prisoner
programme.desc: Chicom agents capture Harm in Hong Kong; they vigorously question him in mainland China about official matters.

programme.title: JAG: Ares
programme.desc: Someone kills a Naval officer on Okinawa, then his ship encounters major trouble during war games at sea

programme.title: JAG: Skeleton Crew
programme.desc: The body of a woman Naval officer, a friend, and classmate of Harm, is found ashore.

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG: Cowboys and Cossaks
programme.desc: Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac Gets Physical / She Brought Her Mother Along/ Cold Feet
programme.desc: A female doctor's temperature rises when she meets Isaac, who tries to avoid his physical exam so he can hide a congenital condition. Meanwhile, a young woman and her mother learn devastating truths about each other when they meet the daughter's fiance.
programme.sub-title: Isaac Gets Physical / She Brought Her Mother Along/ Cold Feet

programme.title: The Love Boat: Burl Of My Dreams / Meet The Author/ Rhymes, Riddles And Romance
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.
programme.sub-title: Burl Of My Dreams / Meet The Author/ Rhymes, Riddles And Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.
programme.sub-title: His Girl Friday / A Wife For Wilfred/ The Girl Who Stood Still

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.
programme.sub-title: Pali-Mony-O-Mine / Does Father Know Best?/ An 'A' For Gopher

programme.title: The Love Boat: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover
programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.
programme.sub-title: Mothers Don't Do That / Marrying For Money/ Substitute Lover

programme.title: The Love Boat: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.
programme.sub-title: Command Performance/ Sketchy Love/ Hyde And Seek

programme.title: The Love Boat: Doc's Big Case/ Senior Sinners/ Abooming Romance
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man
programme.sub-title: Doc's Big Case/ Senior Sinners/ Abooming Romance

programme.title: The Love Boat: Going To The Dogs / Women'S Best Friend / Whose Dog Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing and his crew host passengers and their pooches for the Honeycutt $10.000 Dog Show competition commencing in Acapulco.
programme.sub-title: Going To The Dogs / Women'S Best Friend / Whose Dog Is It Anyway?

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 1
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Spoonmaker Diamond - Part 2
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 1
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 2
programme.desc: Love, adventure and romantic hijinks are afloat when The Love Boat sails to the beautiful Eternal City of Rome and the sites of glorious Capri and Venice in a special two-hour premiere.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.
programme.sub-title: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace

programme.title: The Love Boat: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.
programme.sub-title: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.
programme.sub-title: The Tomorrow Lady/ Father, Dear Father/ Still Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Christmas Presence
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.
programme.sub-title: The Groupies/ The Audition/ Doc'S Nephew

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: MacGyver: Pirates
programme.desc: MacGyver is on the trail of thieves using high-level Navy tactics to steal the 18th-century treasure.

programme.title: MacGyver: Out In the Cold
programme.desc: While vacationing on the slopes, MacGyver and Pete Thornton become targets of a mob "hit" squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack Is Back (Aka "Dalton, Jack of Spies")
programme.desc: MacGyver and his rapscallion buddy Jack Dalton are back together again this time they are up against a CIA agent gone bad and his cohorts, who are smuggling top-secret documents out of the country.
programme.sub-title: Jack Is Back (Aka "Dalton, Jack of Spies")

programme.title: MacGyver: Partners
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves right back where they were seven years ago -- up against a top-level, world-class assassin whom they believed dead.

programme.title: MacGyver: Bushmaster
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to rescue an American cargo pilot being held on espionage charges in Central America.

programme.title: MacGyver: Friends
programme.desc: MacGyver contemplates resigning from the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: MacGyver: DOA: MacGyver
programme.desc: A head injury resulting from a confrontation with hitmen who fear MacGyver knows too much about their assassination plot against the leaders of the Omega Forceanti-terrorist brigade, causes MacGyver (Richard Dean Anderson) to lose his memory.

programme.title: MacGyver: For Love or Money
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Czechoslovakia to rescue a dissident from the top-security psychiatric ward of a Czech hospital.

programme.title: MacGyver: Lost Love (Part 1)

programme.title: MacGyver: Lost Love (Part 2)
programme.desc: MacGyver heists an ancient Chinese artifact as a ransom for a woman he once loved, only to learn she's double-crossed him.

programme.title: MacGyver: Back From The Dead

programme.title: MacGyver: Ghost Ship (Aka "Sasquatch")

programme.title: MacGyver: Fire and Ice

programme.title: MacGyver: Gx-1

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack in the Box

programme.title: MacGyver: Widowmaker
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hell Week
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog helps Tim and fellow bondsman James track down fugitives; the police declare a felon with a long rap sheet to be armed and dangerous; a fugitive abandons her parental responsibilities for the ice pipe.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team chase a woman who has the word "crazy" tattooed on her neck; a woman tries to help Dog snare her sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team hunts for a fugitive with a history of domestic violence; Beth trains for a 5-kilometer race.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team attempts to draw out a woman who failed to appear in court on theft charges; Dog contacts a jeweler to purchase something special for Beth.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What seems like a routine pickup turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit and nail care as Dog and company hunt a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog underestimates a fugitive because of her non-threatening appearance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In a case that hits close to home, Dog seeks out Kali's rough-and-tumble cousin; Baby Lyssa steps in for the unavailable Duane Lee.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strange weapons of the past and present include Japanese ninja claws, microwavelike rays, lasers, robots, the "puke light," and a super slippery substance.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Profile five deadly weapons focusing on inventors, battles, and technology: Tsar Bomba 50-megaton nuclear bomb, WWI machine guns, WWII incendiary bombs, proximity fuses for artillery detonation, and VX nerve gas chemical agent.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Tiny weapons may not sound impressive, but small can kill, and it can also be easily concealed; from a pocket pistol used by the police to a submachine gun wielded by a bodyguard, many of today's most effective weapons are smaller than ever.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Precision-guided weapons become a flashpoint for war critics.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear research ranges from well-known applications, such as bombs and reactors, to little-known uses in medicine, food preparation, and radiation detection. It's also spawned ancillary technologies to store nuclear waste and clean up accidents.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, the Strategic Air Command controls thousands of nuclear weapons, planes and missiles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Nuclear submarines carry more firepower than all bombs dropped in history; since the 1950s, these steel vessels became U.S. defense cornerstones, sparking Cold War underwater competition and creating engineering miracles for deterrence.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Examine Edwards Air Force Base's colorful history as America's premier flight test center for over 60 years; every Air Force aircraft was tested there, including current projects like the Airborne Laser designed to destroy ballistic missiles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strap on a parachute and soar through the saga of jet propulsion which radically transformed the world since inception of World War II.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The X-1 jet breaks the sound barrier; the X-43 Scramjet flies at Mach 7; U-2 and SR-71 Cold War spy planes; flying Wing bombers; the new F/A Raptor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Take a supersonic flight through a world of flying machines that are redefining our skies; pull serious G's in the U.S. military's latest fighter jet: the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: In Alabama, fly with the Apache Longbow, the deadliest helicopter in the world, and learn how to fly the Blackhawk, one of the most versatile helicopters in world; climb aboard a Coast Guard helicopter as a team trains for water rescues in the Gulf.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: America's technologically advanced military descends from Civil War innovations; the first modern war introduced machine guns, aerial reconnaissance, battlefield medicine, ironclad ships, and aircraft carriers that revolutionized warfare.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Allies devise scientific and mechanical breakthroughs to thwart Hitler's Atlantic Wall and to make the D-Day invasion successful.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: June 6, 1944, Operation Overlord springs into action as the greatest WWII machine with thousands of ships, aircraft, thousands of men, and millions of tons of steel; interlocking precision overcomes Hitler's defenses in history's greatest assault.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Infantry soldiers known as "Tunnel Rats" searched for and destroyed secret subterranean enemy networks in Vietnam; armed with flashlights and pistols, these volunteers faced lethal odds and uncovered arms caches, with many casualties.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: At 5:30 a.m., July 16, 1945, scientists and dignitaries awaited the detonation of the first atomic bomb in a desolate area of the New Mexico desert aptly known as Jornada del Muerto--Journey of Death.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Pentagon, completed in 1943, serves as the five-sided nerve center for the nation's armed services and stands as the largest office building in the world, conjuring an imposing image of American military power.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The vehicles that transport the President of the United States aren't your ordinary planes, trains, and automobiles: they are top-secret; and for your Average Joe, there's only two ways to find out what they're really like inside.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The drivers are pushed to their limits when they must shuttle critical supplies to the oil camps of Alaska's North Slope.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers and their rigs are run ragged as they race to haul their last loads; Lisa accepts a load of high explosives; Jack spins out for the first time during the season; Ron's truck springs an oil leak.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As the final 72 hours of the season tick away, George Spears calls it a career; Lisa Kelly makes a harrowing 300-mile run with no brakes; the rivalry between two drivers comes down to the final load; polar bears block the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The season opens and quickly claims its first victim with a wreck; a trucker breaks through to the isolated town of Bettles; Jack returns to defend his title; Greg wants to take him down and has something to prove.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Failing trailer brakes and trash talk over the CB threaten to derail Lisa's comeback; newcomer Greg races to reignite his rivalry with Jack, before a wreck slams the brakes on Greg's need for speed.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Everyone pushes to the limit to get freight to Deadhorse before the season ends in three weeks; Lisa rushes to pick up her next load before joining a convoy north with Jack Jesse; Hugh and Alex discover a fellow fierce competitor on the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Only two weeks are left for the truckers to make big bucks and deliver all their loads to the oil fields; Hugh Rowland's impatience with trainee driver Phil Kromm nearly causes a disaster; Lisa Kelly braves the Arctic Ocean Ice Road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The drivers are pushed to their limits when they must shuttle critical supplies to the oil camps of Alaska's North Slope.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers and their rigs are run ragged as they race to haul their last loads; Lisa accepts a load of high explosives; Jack spins out for the first time during the season; Ron's truck springs an oil leak.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As the final 72 hours of the season tick away, George Spears calls it a career; Lisa Kelly makes a harrowing 300-mile run with no brakes; the rivalry between two drivers comes down to the final load; polar bears block the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The season opens and quickly claims its first victim with a wreck; a trucker breaks through to the isolated town of Bettles; Jack returns to defend his title; Greg wants to take him down and has something to prove.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Failing trailer brakes and trash talk over the CB threaten to derail Lisa's comeback; newcomer Greg races to reignite his rivalry with Jack, before a wreck slams the brakes on Greg's need for speed.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Reigning king Jack Jesse looks to defend his title; Lisa Kelly fights to prove herself in the male dominated profession; Rookie Ray Veilleux comes north to run the road and keep his struggling family afloat.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A phase-three storm hammers Atigun Pass; Alex hits a whiteout coming from Prudhoe; Hugh and Jack hatch a plan to keep the weather from hurting their paychecks; Ray and Lisa make their own plans to keep the loads moving.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack rushes to save an Alaskan town with an emergency fuel delivery; Lisa gets her big chance to step up when she's given her first oversize load; Ray takes a night run as a favor for the boss; Alex's trash talk stirs the sleeping Polar Bear.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The pressure on the drivers builds as the temperatures plunge to 55 below; Jack gets into it with a southbound driver; Hugh gets an earful from an American driver; Alex picks up a hitchhiker; Ray takes on Atigun Pass.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack is left stranded and helpless by an avalanche; Ray faces Dalton with a premonition of death hanging over his head; Hugh drives on the wrong side of the road over Atigun pass.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa tackles the most dangerous haul of the season, trucking a multi-million dollar, 100 ton load across the entire state of Alaska; Alex races to keep pace in the load count; Greg could be a hero of the road; Ray faces the worst night of his career.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's chaos on the Dalton when a truck flips off the road and smashes into a tree; Alex is thrust into the turmoil and faces tough questions from state police; a careless mistake may rob Lisa of hard-earned respect; Greg fights for his job.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Reigning king Jack Jesse looks to defend his title; Lisa Kelly fights to prove herself in the male dominated profession; Rookie Ray Veilleux comes north to run the road and keep his struggling family afloat.

programme.title: I Survived
